message:
You know those moments when you feel like you've finally got your act together? I had one of those recently! I was over at my neighbor’s house when their little one accidentally knocked over a glass of water. As I watched them scramble for paper towels, I couldn't help but feel a little smug. You see, I had just put together a go-bag for my family, complete with snacks, a water bottle, and even a mini first-aid kit. In that moment, as they rushed around trying to clean up, I casually pulled out a towel from my bag and offered it up. 

It felt good to be the prepared one for once! It’s funny how such a small act can make you feel like a superhero in your own little way. This little refresher helped me remember the importance of being ready for anything, even the everyday mishaps. How about you? Have you had a moment where being prepared made all the difference?
